title: Intensely Savory Saudi Arabian Lamb Stew
description: A savory and silky Saudi Arabian lamb stew featuring digestive biscuits and yuzu cure, perfect for a hangover cure and diabetic friendly. This dish is made with tender lamb and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the crushed digestive biscuits and stir to combine.
Add the yuzu juice and 2 cups of water, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
